description_long: This lamp features a modern, geometric design with multiple spherical glass globes arranged around a central metal hub. The globes are evenly distributed on metal arms radiating from the center, creating a starburst or molecular structure effect. The fixture is suspended from a ceiling mount by a straight rod, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The glass globes are likely frosted or opal, diffusing the light for a soft glow. The metal components appear to be finished in a dark, possibly matte or semi-gloss color, contrasting with the white or translucent globes. This style is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban interiors or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern ceiling lamp with multiple frosted glass globes arranged on metal arms in a starburst pattern, suspended from a central rod.
description_view_0: The lamp is seen from an angle showing the cluster of glass globes and the central rod, with several globes visible in a semi-circular arrangement.
description_view_1: A more direct view of the lamp's face, highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the globes and the central hub.
description_view_2: The lamp is viewed from a slightly different angle, revealing the spatial distribution of the globes and the supporting arms.
description_view_3: A rear or alternate side view, showing the back of the globes and the attachment to the ceiling mount.
